2605.22321.title: Benchmarking Autonomous Agents against Temporal, Spatial, and Semantic Evasions
2605.22321.paper_summary: As autonomous agents (e.g., OpenClaw) increasingly operate with deep system-level privileges to execute complex tasks, they introduce severe, unmitigated security risks. Current vulnerability analyses overwhelmingly focus on single-turn, stateless behaviors, overlooking the expanded attack surface inherent in stateful, multi-turn interactions and dynamic tool invocations. In this paper, we propose a novel, multi-dimensional evasion framework targeting LLM-based agent systems. We introduce three stealthy attack vectors: (1) Temporal evasion, which fragments malicious payloads across sequential interaction turns; (2) Spatial evasion, which conceals payloads within complex external artifacts that evade standard LLM parsing mechanisms; and (3) Semantic evasion, which obscures malicious intents beneath benign contextual noise. To systematically quantify these threats, we construct A3S-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 2,254 real-world agent execution trajectories. Evaluating a standard agent framework separately integrated with 10 mainstream LLM backbones against 20 practical threat scenarios, we demonstrate that our evasion framework elevates the average risk trigger rate from a 28.3\% baseline to 52.6\%. These findings reveal systemic, architecture-level vulnerabilities in current autonomous agent systems that existing defenses fail to address, highlighting an urgent need for defense mechanisms tailored to the unique threats.
2605.22321.paper_summary_zh: 隨著自主代理（例如 OpenClaw）越來越多地以深層系統級特權運行以執行複雜任務，它們引入了嚴重且未減輕的安全風險。當前的漏洞分析主要集中在單輪的無狀態行為上，忽略了狀態性、多輪互動和動態工具調用中固有的擴展攻擊面。在本文中，我們提出了一種針對基於 LLM 的代理系統的新穎多維逃避框架。我們引入了三個隱蔽的攻擊向量：（1）時間逃避，將惡意有效載荷分散在連續的互動回合中；（2）空間逃避，將有效載荷隱藏在複雜的外部工件中，以避開標準 LLM 解析機制；（3）語義逃避，將惡意意圖掩蓋在良性上下文噪聲之下。為了系統性地量化這些威脅，我們構建了 A3S-Bench，一個包含 2,254 條真實世界代理執行軌跡的綜合基準。對標準代理框架進行評估，該框架分別與 10 個主流 LLM 主幹集成，針對 20 個實際威脅場景，我們證明我們的逃避框架將平均風險觸發率從 28.3\% 的基線提升至 52.6\%。這些發現揭示了當前自主代理系統中的系統性、架構級漏洞，而現有的防禦措施未能解決這些問題，突顯出針對獨特威脅的防禦機制的迫切需求。
2605.22321.author: Jianan Ma et.al.
2605.22321.authors: Jianan Ma, Xiaohu Du, Ruixiao Lin, Yaoxiang Bian, Jialuo Chen, Jingyi Wang, Xiaofang Yang, Shiwen Cui, Changhua Meng, Xinhao Deng, Zhen Wang
